$description: <Pack Display Name> — canonical design tokens in DTCG format. See design-tokens.css for the CSS custom property version. CUSTOMIZE: Replace all $value fields and update $description strings.

$meta.source: <link to Figma file, reference site, or design source>

color.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Replace all palette tokens. Group names and token names should reflect the aesthetic's color language.

palette.$description: CUSTOMIZE: The signature color palette for this aesthetic. Each token is a named color from the pack's color system.

<color-name-1>.$description: CUSTOMIZE: describe role — e.g., 'Primary accent — used on CTAs, accent bars, active states'

<color-name-2>.$description: CUSTOMIZE: describe role — e.g., 'Secondary accent — data, numerals, secondary CTAs'

<color-name-3>.$description: CUSTOMIZE: describe role — add more palette entries or remove unused ones

neutral.$description: CUSTOMIZE: The neutral scale. Replace values with the actual neutrals for this aesthetic.

black.$description: Deepest background or primary text — customize to match aesthetic (e.g., #0f0f0f, #000000)

off-black.$description: Dark sections, navigation — slightly lighter than black

dark-gray.$description: Structural gray — borders, rules at full strength

cream.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Off-white warm background — delete if the aesthetic uses pure white/light-bg only

white.$description: Pure white — text on dark/accent backgrounds

divider.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Divider line color. Adjust opacity and base color to match aesthetic.

semantic.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Semantic role tokens — map palette tokens to functional roles. Components reference these, never raw palette tokens.

surface.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Card / elevated surface — point to the appropriate neutral or palette token

text-on-dark.$description: Text on dark or accent-colored backgrounds

accent.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Primary accent — point to the correct palette token

accent-secondary.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Secondary accent — point to the correct palette token

display.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Display/headline face. Used for hero headlines, editorial moments. Replace with actual fonts.

label.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Label face — section heads, nav, uppercase labels. Often condensed sans.

body.$value: "<Primary Body Font>", "<Fallback Body Font>", system-ui, sans-serif
body.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Body face — paragraphs, UI text. Never use as display face.

mono.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Monospace face — data, timestamps, code. Delete if aesthetic doesn't use mono.

fontWeight.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Define weights used by this aesthetic. Remove unused weight tokens.

black.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Hero headlines — delete if aesthetic doesn't use ultra-heavy weights

fontSize.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Fluid type scale using clamp(min, preferred, max). Replace all values.

hero.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Hero headline — largest text on page

caption.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Smallest text — footnotes, data labels

letterSpacing.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Define tracking tiers. Negative = tight editorial; positive = expanded labels.

tight.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Display headlines, large type — tighten as size increases

normal.$description: Body text — never add tracking to body text

expanded.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Section heads, caps labels — always paired with text-transform: uppercase

display.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Hero/display — tight, no gap between lines

body.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Body text — generous for readability (1.5–1.9 range)

space.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Spacing scale. Replace values to match the aesthetic's rhythm (tight vs. airy).

radius.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Border-radius scale. 0 = hard industrial; 6–12px = standard; 20–24px = editorial rounded; 50% = pill/circle.

circle.$description: Accent dots, avatars — NEVER for buttons

border.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Named border styles. Use semantic names describing use case.

divider.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Within-section separators — adjust opacity and color

structural.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Grid containers, section frames — adjust weight for aesthetic

accent.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Accent bars, active states, feature item left borders

motion.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Easing curves and durations. Easing character should match aesthetic personality.

ease-out.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Primary easing — smooth deceleration. Adjust for aesthetic personality.

ease-inout.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Elements that transition both ways

duration-slow.$description: CUSTOMIZE: Scroll reveals, page transitions (500–800ms range)

forbidden.$description: Custom audit metadata (not DTCG tokens). Modeled after the HPO canonical token file. The audit skill greps these values as a blocklist. CUSTOMIZE: Add all legacy/banned colors, fonts, and CSS patterns that must never appear in work using this pack.
patterns: CUSTOMIZE: Add banned CSS patterns here — e.g., 'border-radius: 50px', 'text-transform: uppercase /* body */'
CUSTOMIZE: Add more patterns as needed
